<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary unrest:</strong> The upcoming Monsoon session is expected to be highly contentious, driven by shifting political realignments and opposition protests against key legislative proposals.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative agenda:</strong> The Union government faces a challenging session as it prepares to introduce several controversial Bills amidst a backdrop of heightened political friction.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a></span></li>
